visual_findings: The round-18 contact sheet showed no hard crop or float displacement; the selected target was page 3, where Related Work hands off to Method.
The pre-edit transition had the right claim boundary but the proxy-metric paragraph still read like a list of diagnostics before Method began.
The accepted Related Work paragraph now states the story beat more directly: proxy metrics tell whether pixels or features stay close, while grounding systems expose a different contract.
The accepted Method opener turns that distinction into the paper's gate sequence and keeps intervention, evidence layer, and supported claims separate.
The after full contact sheet keeps the 11-page structure stable and does not visibly displace the Method, Results, figures, tables, Ethical Considerations, or References.
change_summary: Rewrote the final Related Work paragraph so proxy metrics become the first evidence layer rather than a standalone diagnostic list.
Rewrote the Method opener to connect the Related Work distinction to the evidence-gate sequence.
Preserved all citations, evidence gates, claim boundaries, and reported counts.

verification.command: rg -n "Overfull|Float too large|too large|LaTeX Warning: Float|Rerun to get|Warning:.*Label|Undefined references|multiply defined|Package lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log || true

residual_risk: Focused page-3 Related Work to Method transition polish only; this is not a final upload audit, target-policy refresh, or integrity-fingerprint refresh.
